item.title: Art Nouveau with a nerdy flavor
item.description:
This one is https://www.friedunicorn.studio/ I am trying to find artists to credit, so please bear with me. Sorry, y'all, for the dissatisfaction IF YOU FIND ONE, PLEASE TELL ME AND I'LL ADD IT TO THE IMAGE DESCRIPTION Edit: a better man than I has done the work, go check it out!! Nerdy Art Nouveau (with artists tagged) https://imgur.com/gallery/9ewN81l
https://www.mybeautifulmonsters.com/

item.title: The 368th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 3
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.dc:creator: SanshinDojo

item.title: I WAS ACCEPTED!
item.description: Big thank you to everybody who commented on my original post about this. It was so bad that I was physically ill. Had a short, but very nice meeting with the veteran affairs representative. Have to say, one of the nicer people I've met through the VA. We haven't nailed down exactly what I go to school for yet. Though, the hard part is done. Most Viral Edit: yet again the imgur community is here with me through a big life change. All I can say is thank you for the support. You folks are truly one of a kind. Thank you for all the previous and feature help and conversations.
item.dc:creator: AnSquirrel

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1053
item.description:
Dawn has come. It is bitter and cold, by my standards anyway: 32 degrees F. Exactly 0 Celsius. Pippin and I are ready to be problems for the Universe. Let's get this bread.
I do wonder, but I also strongly suspect that most people on that list are online, rather than in, uh, meatspace.
I'm both. At the same time.
Last night ended up with lots of cool excitement, even though for most of the day, I couldn't really motivate myself off of my bed. I wasn't laying in it, but I didn't want to leave it either.
My boss, for my second job, the winery gig, had received as a gift a 1961 Pommard (Pinot from Burgundy). It hadn't been stored in the best conditions, but exploring wines this old is always a unique learning experience. Besides, when would be the next time I'd taste wine from the year humanity first went to space, the year of the Bay of Pigs invasion? It was history in a bottle. I couldn't say no. It would be worth a taste. Even if it had turned completely to vinegar.
So there we were, my boss, my best friend, and I, in a corner of a wine bar, with a charcuterie plate, staring at this bottle, anticipation building. What would it be like? Would there be anything left? Slowly, Greg pulled the ancient cork out of the bottle, which had turned black and brittle with age and evaporated wine. (Diplodocus with Ceratosaurs)
The moment of truth arrived, and we poured it into out glasses. 1961 Pommard. The color had changed from vibrant red to an oxidized prune color, almost brown. We held our breath, expecting the worst. And you know what? The wine, despite being stored improperly for years, held up surprisingly well, though it was still Hella oxidized. Notes of rose, figs, prunes, forest floor, almond paste, dried violets, could still be tasted and smelled, mingling with tart oxidation notes reminiscent of a cheaper Madeira. It hadn't quite become vinegar. If this wine had been stored correctly, it probably would have qualified for "amazing" status instead of "fascinating in a good way." A worthy experience.
Philosophers of the 1800's went a little wild over Indian religious traditions like Buddhism and "Hinduism".
But very closely related to sharks, more on the ratfish side I think?
I mean, with fascism (especially of the Protestant Christo-fascist type) and climate change and the fact that as a country we've decided to fuck all the people Jesus actually said to care about, we are definitely entering "an" end time. It's up to us to make sure that the people who think it's the end of history don't stay in charge so we can create a sustainable future.
This is absolutely true. In some tombs that have been preserved by permafrost, the cannabis in aforementioned stash boxes was preserved, though, I'm told, too dry to smoke. But enough genetic information was preserved in them that some of the early domestication processes for this herb are now becoming well understood, or so I've read in passing.
I feel like I need this sign somewhere in my apartment.
And then you get Orthodox people... there are two kinds of us. One kind makes the evangelicals look like they're having fun, the other kind will drink the Catholics under the table and make them seem austere. Guess which group is mostly converts. Go on. Guess.
I miss having JSTOR access.
I'm not gonna show you all my room, but yeah, minimalism does not apply to my space. You wanna see my room? Come and visit me.
Nom.
Titanosaur at dusk.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Good morning! Morning. Morning. *whistle noise* *painful groaning sound* *laughter*
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
